experiences.description: Developing features for the GMS (Game Management System) in production using React.js and Vue.js. Implementing UI components and form logic with Vue 3 (Composition API), consuming REST APIs, and resolving bugs under agile methodologies.

Real-time management and recording of football and chovgan match events in an international multi-sport event under critical time conditions and high pressure, ensuring precision and speed in the official scoring systems.
Executing functional and regression tests on the GMS platform prior to transitioning to the development team. Identifying and documenting bug reports and edge cases.
